content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: All staff attorneys

Date: July 27, 1978

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Dan Lowenstein

Subject:

The United States Court of Appeal for the Fifth Circuit recently upheld the financial disclosure requirements added to the Florida Constitution by initiative in 1975. These requirements are in many respects far broader than those in Chapter 7 of the Political Reform Act. The court's opinion, by Judge Wisdom, can be found at 575 F.2d 1119.

DHL:plh
